Container.Name: Bambuddy
Container.Overview: A powerful, self-hosted print archive and management system for Bambu Lab 3D printers. No cloud dependency, complete privacy, full control. NOTE: This container MUST run in HOST network mode for printer auto-discovery and local slicer integrations to work properly.
Container.DonateText: Don't donate to me! Instead, please donate the creators of the apps, but if you insist

Config.Name: Time Zone
Config.Description: Set the operational time zone for print logs and scheduled tasks.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: The internal port Bambuddy uses for its web dashboard server. Since Network Mode is locked to 'host', changing this value directly alters the port used on your Unraid host (e.g. http://your-unraid-ip:8000).

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage location for your SQLite database, custom settings, and print farm configurations.

Config.Name: Logs
Config.Description: Persistent storage folder where application runtime and printer connection logs are saved.

Config.Name: Virtual Printer Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage path for the local Virtual Printer emulation layer, allowing OrcaSlicer/Bambu Studio to handle direct LAN transfers.

Container.Changes: ### 2026.05.29 - Optimised database shutdown handling with extended 30s stop timeout. - Dynamic WebUI port routing alignment. ### 2026.01.22 - Fix port for webui issue ### 2026.01.21 - Initial Release
